req.title: Close encounter
req.statement: A clinician shall close an Encounter; closed Encounters shall reject further modifications except for addendum Observations.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for Encounter close functionality and modification restrictions.

Requirement: A clinician shall close an Encounter; closed Encounters shall
reject further modifications except for addendum Observations.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
import uuid


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain model stubs – replace with real imports from your application
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
from encounter import (
    Encounter,
    EncounterStatus,
    Observation,
    ObservationType,
    EncounterClosedError,
    UnauthorizedRoleError,
    InvalidEncounterTransitionError,
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers / fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def make_clinician(role: str = "clinician") -> MagicMock:
    user = MagicMock()
    user.id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    user.role = role
    return user


def make_open_encounter(clinician=None) -> Encounter:
    if clinician is None:
        clinician = make_clinician()
    enc = Encounter(
        encounter_id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
        patient_id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
        clinician=clinician,
        started_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )
    assert enc.status == EncounterStatus.OPEN
    return enc


def make_closed_encounter(clinician=None) -> Encounter:
    enc = make_open_encounter(clinician=clinician)
    enc.close(closed_by=enc.clinician)
    assert enc.status == EncounterStatus.CLOSED
    return enc


def make_observation(obs_type: ObservationType = ObservationType.PRIMARY) -> Observation:
    return Observation(
        observation_id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
        obs_type=obs_type,
        value="normal",
        recorded_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Closing an Encounter
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestCloseEncounter:
    """A clinician shall be able to close an open Encounter."""

    def test_clinician_can_close_open_encounter(self):
        """Happy path: clinician closes an open encounter."""
        clinician = make_clinician("clinician")
        enc = make_open_encounter(clinician=clinician)

        enc.close(closed_by=clinician)

        assert enc.status == EncounterStatus.CLOSED

    def test_closed_encounter_records_closed_timestamp(self):
        """Closing an encounter stamps the closed_at datetime."""
        enc = make_open_encounter()
        before = datetime.now(timezone.utc)

        enc.close(closed_by=enc.clinician)

        assert enc.closed_at is not None
        assert enc.closed_at >= before

    def test_closed_encounter_records_who_closed_it(self):
        """Closing an encounter records the clinician who performed the action."""
        clinician = make_clinician("clinician")
        enc = make_open_encounter(clinician=clinician)

        enc.close(closed_by=clinician)

        assert enc.closed_by == clinician

    def test_closing_already_closed_encounter_raises(self):
        """Attempting to close an already-closed encounter is an invalid transition."""
        enc = make_closed_encounter()

        with pytest.raises(InvalidEncounterTransitionError):
            enc.close(closed_by=enc.clinician)

    def test_non_clinician_cannot_close_encounter(self):
        """Only a clinician role may close an encounter."""
        receptionist = make_clinician("receptionist")
        enc = make_open_encounter()

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorizedRoleError):
            enc.close(closed_by=receptionist)

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("privileged_role", ["clinician", "attending_physician", "nurse_practitioner"])
    def test_privileged_roles_can_close_encounter(self, privileged_role):
        """All clinical roles authorised to close encounters succeed."""
        actor = make_clinician(privileged_role)
        enc = make_open_encounter(clinician=actor)

        enc.close(closed_by=actor)

        assert enc.status == EncounterStatus.CLOSED


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Modifications rejected on a closed Encounter
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestClosedEncounterRejectsModifications:
    """Closed encounters shall reject further modifications."""

    # -- Encounter-level fields ----------------------------------------------

    def test_cannot_update_diagnosis_on_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.update_diagnosis(diagnosis="J06.9", updated_by=enc.clinician)

    def test_cannot_update_patient_on_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.update_patient(patient_id=str(uuid.uuid4()), updated_by=enc.clinician)

    def test_cannot_change_clinician_on_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        new_clinician = make_clinician("clinician")

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.assign_clinician(clinician=new_clinician, updated_by=enc.clinician)

    def test_cannot_update_encounter_notes_on_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.update_notes(notes="revised notes", updated_by=enc.clinician)

    # -- Primary observations -----------------------------------------------

    def test_cannot_add_primary_observation_to_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        obs = make_observation(ObservationType.PRIMARY)

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.add_observation(observation=obs, added_by=enc.clinician)

    def test_cannot_edit_existing_observation_on_closed_encounter(self):
        """An observation added before closing cannot be edited after closing."""
        enc = make_open_encounter()
        obs = make_observation(ObservationType.PRIMARY)
        enc.add_observation(observation=obs, added_by=enc.clinician)
        enc.close(closed_by=enc.clinician)

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.edit_observation(
                observation_id=obs.observation_id,
                value="abnormal",
                updated_by=enc.clinician,
            )

    def test_cannot_delete_observation_on_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_open_encounter()
        obs = make_observation(ObservationType.PRIMARY)
        enc.add_observation(observation=obs, added_by=enc.clinician)
        enc.close(closed_by=enc.clinician)

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.delete_observation(
                observation_id=obs.observation_id,
                deleted_by=enc.clinician,
            )

    # -- Medication / order fields (extend as needed) -----------------------

    def test_cannot_add_medication_order_to_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.add_medication_order(
                medication="amoxicillin 500 mg",
                ordered_by=enc.clinician,
            )

    def test_cannot_update_encounter_start_time_on_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.update_start_time(
                started_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
                updated_by=enc.clinician,
            )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Addendum Observations ARE allowed on a closed Encounter
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestClosedEncounterAllowsAddendumObservations:
    """Closed encounters shall accept addendum Observations."""

    def test_addendum_observation_can_be_added_to_closed_encounter(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        addendum = make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM)

        # Should NOT raise
        enc.add_observation(observation=addendum, added_by=enc.clinician)

        assert addendum.observation_id in [o.observation_id for o in enc.observations]

    def test_addendum_observation_is_stamped_as_addendum(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        addendum = make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM)

        enc.add_observation(observation=addendum, added_by=enc.clinician)

        stored = next(o for o in enc.observations if o.observation_id == addendum.observation_id)
        assert stored.obs_type == ObservationType.ADDENDUM

    def test_addendum_observation_records_author(self):
        clinician = make_clinician("clinician")
        enc = make_closed_encounter(clinician=clinician)
        addendum = make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM)

        enc.add_observation(observation=addendum, added_by=clinician)

        stored = next(o for o in enc.observations if o.observation_id == addendum.observation_id)
        assert stored.added_by == clinician

    def test_multiple_addendum_observations_can_be_added(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        addenda = [make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM) for _ in range(3)]

        for obs in addenda:
            enc.add_observation(observation=obs, added_by=enc.clinician)

        addendum_ids = {o.observation_id for o in enc.observations
                        if o.obs_type == ObservationType.ADDENDUM}
        for obs in addenda:
            assert obs.observation_id in addendum_ids

    def test_non_clinician_cannot_add_addendum_to_closed_encounter(self):
        """Role check still applies even for addenda."""
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        addendum = make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM)
        receptionist = make_clinician("receptionist")

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorizedRoleError):
            enc.add_observation(observation=addendum, added_by=receptionist)

    def test_primary_observation_disguised_as_addendum_is_rejected(self):
        """An observation with PRIMARY type cannot be added to a closed encounter
        even if the caller labels it as an addendum via the wrong type."""
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        # Attempt to sneak in a primary obs
        obs = make_observation(ObservationType.PRIMARY)

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.add_observation(observation=obs, added_by=enc.clinician)

    def test_addendum_observation_does_not_reopen_encounter(self):
        """Adding an addendum shall NOT change the encounter status back to OPEN."""
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        addendum = make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM)

        enc.add_observation(observation=addendum, added_by=enc.clinician)

        assert enc.status == EncounterStatus.CLOSED

    def test_addendum_observation_timestamp_is_after_close_time(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        addendum = make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM)

        enc.add_observation(observation=addendum, added_by=enc.clinician)

        stored = next(o for o in enc.observations if o.observation_id == addendum.observation_id)
        assert stored.recorded_at >= enc.closed_at


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. State-transition audit / event log
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestEncounterAuditOnClose:
    """Closing an encounter should emit an auditable event."""

    def test_close_event_is_recorded_in_encounter_history(self):
        clinician = make_clinician("clinician")
        enc = make_open_encounter(clinician=clinician)

        enc.close(closed_by=clinician)

        event_types = [e.event_type for e in enc.history]
        assert "ENCOUNTER_CLOSED" in event_types

    def test_addendum_event_is_recorded_in_encounter_history(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        addendum = make_observation(ObservationType.ADDENDUM)

        enc.add_observation(observation=addendum, added_by=enc.clinician)

        event_types = [e.event_type for e in enc.history]
        assert "OBSERVATION_ADDENDUM_ADDED" in event_types

    def test_rejected_modification_does_not_pollute_history(self):
        enc = make_closed_encounter()
        history_length_before = len(enc.history)

        with pytest.raises(EncounterClosedError):
            enc.update_diagnosis(diagnosis="Z00.0", updated_by=enc.clinician)

        assert len(enc.history) == history_length_before
```

---

## What the tests cover

| # | Area | Key assertions |
|---|------|----------------|
| 1 | **Closing an Encounter** | Clinician can close; status → `CLOSED`; timestamp & actor recorded; double-close raises; non-clinician raises; parametrised role variants |
| 2 | **Modifications rejected** | `EncounterClosedError` raised for diagnosis, patient, clinician, notes, primary observations (add/edit/delete), medication orders, start-time changes |
| 3 | **Addendum Observations allowed** | Addenda accepted; stamped with correct type & author; multiple addenda work; role check still enforced; status stays `CLOSED`; timestamp ≥ `closed_at`; PRIMARY obs still rejected |
| 4 | **Audit trail** | `ENCOUNTER_CLOSED` event emitted; `OBSERVATION_ADDENDUM_ADDED` event emitted; failed modifications leave history unchanged |
